name: Indraprastha Gas Limited
summary: Indraprastha Gas Limited (IGL) is a natural gas distribution company supplying compressed natural gas (CNG) to the transport sector and piped natural gas (PNG) to domestic, commercial, and industrial consumers. IGL operates primarily in Delhi, Noida, Greater Noida, Ghaziabad, and Rewari. The company is headquartered in New Delhi, India.
